summary: Backend-only verification completed for P0 wh_5a terminal completion and final-report authority facts fix. All 178 tests pass across 11 targeted test files. The fix correctly: (1) treats the exact Russian wh_5a repair-complete transcript as authoritative terminal state (activeStepId=null, isolationComplete=true, no wh_5b injection), (2) uses repaired/restored terminal state as final-report source of truth via deriveFinalReportAuthorityFacts() and buildFinalReportAuthorityConstraint(), (3) preserves all prior regression behaviors.
critical_code_review_comments: context-engine.ts:60-120 correctly adds stronger RU restoration phrases (проблема устранена, неисправность устранена) and fuse fault patterns to RESTORATION_PATTERNS and FAULT_PATTERNS
route.ts:38-42, 173-174, 465-474, 575-594 correctly builds final-report authority facts from runtime context/history and passes them into report generation/fallback
fact-pack.ts deriveFinalReportAuthorityFacts() correctly extracts complaint, diagnosticProcedure, verifiedCondition, correctiveAction, requiredParts from terminal state and recent history
fact-pack.ts buildFinalReportAuthorityConstraint() correctly formats authority facts as prompt constraint for final-report source of truth
output-policy.ts buildFinalReportFallback() now accepts authority facts for deterministic fallback content
response-validation-service.ts buildPrimaryFallbackResponse() passes finalReportAuthorityFacts to buildFinalReportFallback()
openai-execution-service.ts executePrimaryChatCompletion() passes finalReportAuthorityFacts through the validation/fallback chain
New route tests verify: exact wh_5a transcript terminal test and START FINAL REPORT restored-state regression
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 wh_5a terminal completion and final-report authority facts verified. Key behaviors: (1) The exact Russian transcript 'Был неисправен предохранитель. Я заменил. Теперь водонагреватель работает. Проблема устранена' at wh_5a correctly triggers terminal state (activeStepId=null, isolationComplete=true, terminalState.phase='terminal'), no wh_5b injection. (2) START FINAL REPORT after terminal state uses deriveFinalReportAuthorityFacts() to extract repaired/restored state as source of truth (failed fuse root cause, fuse replacement corrective action, water heater operational after repair). (3) All prior regression tests pass including wh_5 dominance, wh_6a no-loop, clarification, prompt-composer, mode-validator, final-report transition, completion-detection, and terminal-state tests.
rca_of_the_issue: Root cause: (1) The exact Russian repair-complete phrasing 'Был неисправен предохранитель. Я заменил. Теперь водонагреватель работает. Проблема устранена' needed stronger restoration detection patterns in context-engine.ts so terminal state becomes authoritative at wh_5a. (2) Final-report generation was using raw historical facts without an authoritative latest-state overlay, so stale pre-repair facts (like 'No 12V present') could win over the repaired/restored final state. Fix: (1) Added explicit resolution phrasing patterns to RESTORATION_PATTERNS covering 'проблема устранена', 'неисправность устранена' combined with repair verbs and operational confirmation. (2) deriveFinalReportAuthorityFacts() now extracts authoritative facts from terminal state + recent history, buildFinalReportAuthorityConstraint() formats them as prompt constraint, and the fallback generation chain uses these authority facts as source of truth.
